1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - neck - range of motion. 0 = No Limitation, 1 = Limitation on one side, 2 = Limitation on both sides, "-" = Unknown.
231 G4AB G4AB_NECK_MOVE (G4AB) Neck Voluntary Movement CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - voluntary movement - neck. 0 = No Loss, 1 = Partial Loss, 2 = Full Loss, "-" = Unknown.
232 G4BA G4BA_ARM_RANGE
